productDisplayName: Mr. Men Boys Mr. Noisy Yellow T-shirt
description: Style Note Stretchy and comfy room-to-grow style t-shirt from Mr men, this stylish tee is the go-to piece for summertime games and fun, this tee will last longer than his scruffy escapades!Product DetailsYellow t-shirt with a round ribbed neckline, short, white raglan sleeves with slightly distressed rubber and graphic print on the frontMaterial and Care100% CottonMachine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergentUse a non chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry lowCool iron do not iron on decorationsDo not dry clean
